---
title: "Roll-up Guidance"
execute: 
  enabled: false
---

## Detail 

This package provides valuable roll-up codes for EHR data processing. It includes a variety of functions, such as:

- [rollup](rollup_function.qmd)

- [summarize_unmapped](summarize_unmapped_function.qmd)

- [filter_rolledup_data](filter_rollup_data_function.qmd)

- [rollup_data_by_batch](rollup_data_by_batch_function.qmd)
